dishes.name: Cucumber raita
dishes.premium_description: A cooling yogurt preparation blended with fresh cucumber and mild spices for a refreshing accompaniment.

dishes.name: Mixed fruit raita
dishes.premium_description: A delightful mix of seasonal fruits folded into creamy yogurt, offering a sweet and refreshing taste.

dishes.name: Boondi raita
dishes.premium_description: Crispy gram flour pearls soaked in seasoned yogurt, delivering a balance of texture and flavor.

dishes.name: Mix raita
dishes.premium_description: A combination of vegetables and spices blended into yogurt for a wholesome accompaniment.

dishes.name: Mint pineapple raita
dishes.premium_description: A refreshing yogurt mix with pineapple and mint, offering a sweet and cooling contrast.

dishes.name: Pudina raita
dishes.premium_description: Yogurt infused with fresh mint leaves for a refreshing and aromatic flavor.

dishes.name: Jeera raita
dishes.premium_description: Yogurt flavored with roasted cumin, offering a subtle earthy taste.

dishes.name: Onion & chili raita
dishes.premium_description: A tangy yogurt preparation with onion and green chili for a slightly spicy kick.

dishes.name: Tomato raita
dishes.premium_description: Fresh tomatoes blended with yogurt and spices for a light and tangy accompaniment.
